title: A bite for the Entity
description: In public matches, sacrifice a total of 100 survivors.

title: A Fast Death
description: Damage a Survivor with the Haste Status effect 8 times in public matches.

title: A feast for the Entity
description: In public matches, sacrifice a total of 1000 survivors.

title: Apt Killer
description: Start a public match with a full killer loadout.

title: Awakened Anger
description: In public matches, damage a Survivor who just blinded you within 30 seconds.

title: Beyond Broken
description: Injure a Survivor afflicted by the Broken Status Effect with a Basic Attack a total of 50 times.

title: Blood on your hands
description: In a public match, kill your first survivor.

title: Chorus of Chaos
description: In public matches, make 30 unique survivors scream.

title: Complete the Evolution
description: In public matches, injure or down 3 Survivors who are Hindered.

title: Deadly Obsession
description: In a public match, hook the Obsession 300 times.

title: Deadly Plunge
description: In public matches, as a Killer, fall a combined distance of 1000 meters.

title: Death Flight
description: Injure Survivors after you vaulted during a chase 20 times in public matches.

title: Death of Ignorance
description: Down a Survivor suffering from the Oblivious status effect 15 times in public matches.

title: Denied!
description: In public matches, close the hatch 30 times.

title: Devoted Gatekeeping
description: In public matches, sacrifice all survivors before the last generator is repaired, 15 times.

title: Disarm and Dismember
description: In public matches, hit 50 Survivors holding a Special Item.

title: End of Days
description: Hook 15 Survivors during the End Game Collapse in public matches.

title: Expert Killer
description: Reach killer online grade Silver I.

title: From the Deep
description: Grab a Survivor hiding inside a locker 25 times in public matches.

title: Game Over
description: In public matches, sacrifice or kill 30 Survivors after the last Generator has been activated.

title: Ghost in the Machine
description: Damage 50 generators while Undetectable in public matches.

title: Heavy Burden
description: In public matches, hit 25 different individual Survivors while carrying another Survivor.

title: High Speed Pursuit
description: As a Killer, vault 50 times while chasing Survivors in public matches.

title: I See You
description: Down 30 Survivors suffering from the Exposed status effect in public matches.

title: Joke’s On You
description: In public matches, hit a Survivor within 3 seconds of performing a Scamper 10 times.

title: Legendary Killer
description: Reach Killer Iridescent I.

title: Lost All Hope
description: Down a Survivor within the bounds of any Exit Gate.

title: Master Killer
description: Reach killer online grade Gold I.

title: Master Manipulator
description: In public matches, damage a Survivor while they are healing another or repairing 5 times.

title: Multi-tasker
description: Down 30 Survivors while carrying another Survivor in public matches.

title: Neither Seen Nor Heard
description: Apply the Oblivious status effect to Survivors 30 times in public matches.

title: None the Wiser
description: In public matches, hit 5 Survivors that are Oblivious.

title: Outrage
description: In public matches, during a chase, damage a Survivor who drops a Pallet within a chase, 100 times.

title: Outta Nowhere
description: In public matches, hit 40 Survivors with a basic attack while you are Undetectable.

title: Party Crasher
description: In public matches, damage a generator while at least 1 Survivor is Hooked, 100 times.

title: Perfect Killing
description: In a public match, as a killer, complete with at least 5000 blood points in each score category.

title: Preemptive Strike
description: Hook a Survivor in a public match before any generators have been fully repaired.

title: Prized Possession
description: As a Killer, finish a public match with at least one Hex totem standing.

title: Prowler
description: Detect 100 Survivors with Killer Instinct in public matches.

title: Quick Draw
description: Interrupt a Survivor cleansing a Totem 10 times in public matches.

title: Serial Killer
description: In public matches, Sacrifice the Obsession 30 times.

title: Share the Pain
description: In a public match as a Killer, have all four Survivors injured at the same time.

title: Silent Approach
description: In public matches, interrupt and grab 25 Survivors while they are repairing generators.

title: Taste the Darkness
description: In public matches, interrupt 10 Survivors while they are performing a vault.

title: Texas BBQ
description: In public matches, hook 25 Survivors in the Basement. Once per Survivor per match.

title: The Grand Sacrifice
description: In a public match, get 4 sacrifices in a single match.

title: What Lurks Beneath
description: In public matches, injure Survivors while in the Basement 25 times.

title: Battle Caster
description: As The Lich, injure a Survivor with a basic attack within 15 seconds of casting a spell 25 times.

title: Binding Teeth

title: Bloodbath

description: In public matches, cleanse 100 Hex totems.

description: In public matches, perform a fast vault within 3 seconds of getting hit 15 times.

description: In public matches, repair a Generator in the Damage state , 50 Times. One time per generator.

description: In public matches, open the exit gate 35 times as a Survivor.

description: In public matches, complete 20 healing actions on Survivors once all generators have been completed.

description: Deplete 30 items in public matches.

description: Escape 8 times while repairing the equivalent of 1 generator with only 2 universal perks equipped.

title: Expert survivor
description: Reach survivor online grade Silver I.

title: Fearless Healer
description: In public matches, heal a total of 25 Health States while in the Basement.

title: Final Days
description: In public matches, take 10 protection hits during the Endgame Collapse.

title: Fleet of Foot
description: Help other Survivors by increasing their movement speed 50 times.

title: Handyman

title: Healthy Obsession
description: Heal other Survivors marked as the Obsession for a total of 10 health states in public matches.

title: Hiding Seeker

title: Honor the Bloodline
description: In public matches, reveal the Killer's aura for a total of 60 seconds in a single trial.

title: Humanitarian
description: Affect other Survivors with positive status effects 50 times in public matches.

title: I've got your back
description: In public matches, save a total of 50 survivors from death.

title: Insult and Injury
description: Escape a chase 50 times after stunning the Killer with a pallet in public matches.

description: In a public match, as the killer's obsession, escape as the last survivor without getting hit.

title: Key to Success
description: In a public match, use a key to open a chest.

title: Kitted Out
description: In 35 different public matches, pick up and use at least one Special Item as a Survivor.

title: Leapfrog
description: In public matches, jump over a pallet or through a window during a chase, 200 times.

title: Left For Dead
description: As the last person still alive, activate the last generator and escape through the exit gate.

title: Legendary survivor
description: Reach survivor online grade Iridescent I.

title: Lifting The Fog
description: Reveal the Killer's aura 50 times in public matches.

title: Looter
description: In public matches, unlock 100 chests.

title: Made it out alive!
description: In public matches, escape the match alive for a total of 100 times.

title: Make Some Noise
description: In public matches, scream 50 times.

title: Master survivor
description: Reach survivor online grade Gold I.

title: Medic
description: In public matches, heal others for a total of 100 health states.

title: Milk 'n' Cookies
description: In a public match, take the item from the chest in the basement in at least 30 different trials.

title: Near-Death Experience
description: In public matches, get downed only once and escape the match alive, 25 times.

title: Nerves of steel
description: In public matches, get a total of 500 successful Skill-Checks.

title: No one left behind
description: In a public match, rescue someone after at least one gate has opened.

title: Not Today
description: In public matches, unhook yourself 50 times.

title: One More Step
description: In public matches, take a hit while you have the Endurance status effect 10 times.

title: Outrun Evil
description: In a public match, crawl your way out through the hatch.

title: Perfect Escape
description: In a public match, as a survivor, complete with at least 5000 blood points in each score category.

title: Power Moves
description: Equip 0 perks, repair generators for a total of 1 full repair and escape 8 times in public matches.

title: Practice Makes Perfect
description: In public matches, succeed in 100 healing or repair skill checks.

title: Rescue Mission
description: Stun the Killer with a pallet while they are carrying a Survivor 5 times.

title: Resourceful
description: In public matches, swap held Survivor items for new ones from chests 10 times (max once per chest).

title: Risk it all
description: In a public match, as a survivor, use a visceral item or add-on without using a protective ward.

title: Second Act
description: In public matches, recover from dying by yourself or with help 10 times.

title: Selfless Survival
description: Heal a Survivor from the dying state to the injured state 30 times in public matches.

title: Shine On
description: In public matches, blind the Killer with a flashlight 30 times.

title: Sorted
description: In a public match, spend most of the trial injured (more than 50%) and live to tell the story.

title: Stranger Sightings

title: Survival Treasures
description: In a public match, escape while bringing a new item to the campfire.

title: Taking One For The Team

title: The Key to Escape
description: Escape through the Hatch using a Key in a public match.

title: The Show Must Go On
description: In public matches, finish repairing 10 generators while injured.

title: Triage

title: Under Pressure
description: In public matches, perform 20 great skill checks while injured.

title: Vulture
description: In a public match, escape with an item that another player brought into the match.

title: Whiffing to Success

title: With Scars to Show

title: Working Overtime

title: Wounded Healer
description: In public matches, heal other Survivors for a total of 50 health states while you are also injured.

title: Bloody Millionaire
description: Accumulate a total of 1 million blood points. (blood points can be spent before reaching the total)

title: Getting the hang of it
description: Raise your grade for the first time.

title: Gifts for the Fog
description: In a public match, burn a Visceral offering.
